evals.expected_output: Assistant asks only for the user's real resignation reason before generating the package, without inventing unknown facts.

evals.prompt: 我想离职，真实原因是受不了领导，帮我准备完整离职申请包
evals.expected_output: Assistant rewrites the sensitive reason professionally and outputs exactly one complete package with only these three top-level Chinese sections: 离职申请表填写建议, 面谈准备, 提离职流程建议. Unknown facts use placeholders rather than invented values.

evals.prompt: 我准备因为职业发展离职，帮我想想怎么跟领导说，以及申请表怎么填
evals.expected_output: Assistant generates a complete package without unnecessary questions using exactly these three top-level Chinese sections: 离职申请表填写建议, 面谈准备, 提离职流程建议. It includes interview Q&A preparation, online leader message, multiple meeting-room opening options, placeholders for unknown facts, and positive or neutral-positive descriptions of the company, leader, team, and colleagues.
